bead.title: Add attachment storage model for bead events arrays
bead.description: Per ADR-004's attachment model and the TD from C1: store the events array of closed/archived beads under .ddx/attachments/<bead-id>/events.jsonl (or whatever layout the TD picked) instead of inline in the bead row. The bead row carries only a reference. Lazy-load when 'ddx bead show <id>' or other event-aware tools query the bead.
bead.acceptance: 1. New closed beads write events to attachment store, not inline. 2. ddx bead show <id> reads attachments transparently. 3. Bead-row size reduced (verify by stat on a few attachments-using beads). 4. bd/br export still produces a single inline events array (interchange compatibility). 5. Tests: 'cd cli && go test -run TestAttachment ./internal/bead/'.
